meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode AppSec Village - Pedro Umbelino ,João Morais -   Android Bug Foraging
meta.description: In this session, we will analyze four real-world examples of different high impact android vulnerabilities. We will show how we discover, developed, and leveraged the vulnerabilities into a fully working proof-of-concept, devised meaningful attack scenarios (demos included), and how our work was approached by the different vendors.
